stages.concept:
# Unit 108: 5형식 목적격 보어의 형태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **5형식 목적격 보어의 다양한 형태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 목적격 보어로 **to부정사**가 오는 경우:

> I want **you to come**.
> 나는 네가 오기를 원한다.

> She asked **me to help** her.
> 그녀는 나에게 도와달라고 요청했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 목적격 보어로 **원형부정사**가 오는 경우 (사역/지각동사):

> She **made** him **laugh**.
> 그녀는 그를 웃게 만들었다.

> I **saw** her **dance**.
> 나는 그녀가 춤추는 것을 보았다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 목적격 보어로 **현재분사(-ing)**가 오는 경우:

> I **found** him **sleeping** on the sofa.
> 나는 그가 소파에서 자고 있는 것을 발견했다.

> I **heard** someone **singing**.
> 나는 누군가 노래하고 있는 것을 들었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 목적격 보어로 **과거분사(p.p.)**가 오는 경우:

> I **had** my hair **cut**.
> 나는 머리를 잘랐다. (잘리게 했다)

> She **found** the window **broken**.
> 그녀는 창문이 깨져 있는 것을 발견했다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"I saw him (       ) the street." (나는 그가 길을 건너는 것을 보았다.)
1. crossed
2. cross ✅ (또는 crossing)
3. to cross

👩‍🏫 선생님: 지각동사(see, hear, feel 등)의 목적격 보어로는 원형부정사(cross)나 현재분사(crossing)가 올 수 있어요. to부정사는 안 된답니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 목적격 보어로 명사, 형용사, to부정사, 원형부정사, 현재분사, 과거분사가 올 수 있군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 108: 5형식 목적격 보어의 형태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I want you (     ) early.
> **정답** to come

---

**02.** She made me ? the room.
> **정답** clean

---

**03.** I saw him ? in the park.
> **정답** run (running)

---

**04.** He asked me ? him.
> **정답** to help

---

**05.** We heard her ? a song.
> **정답** sing (singing)

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She made me to wash the dishes.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to wash → wash

---

**07.** I want you coming early.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** coming → to come

---

**08.** He let me to use his pen.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to use → use

---

**09.** She asked me helping her.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** helping → to help

---

**10.** I saw him to play soccer.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to play → play (playing)

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
엄마가 나에게 방을 청소하게 시켰다.
Mom made me the room.
> **정답** clean

---

**12.** 나는 그녀가 오기를 원한다.
I want her .
> **정답** to come

---

**13.** 선생님이 우리를 가게 해 주셨다.
The teacher let us .
> **정답** go

---

**14.** 나는 그가 기타 치는 것을 들었다.
I heard him the guitar.
> **정답** play (playing)

---

**15.** 그녀는 나에게 조용히 하라고 했다.
She told me quiet.
> **정답** to be

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
엄마가 나에게 설거지를 시켰다.
Mom me made wash the dishes
> **정답** Mom / made / me / wash / the / dishes

---

**17.** 나는 그녀가 일찍 오기를 원한다.
want I her to come early
> **정답** I / want / her / to / come / early

---

**18.** 선생님이 우리를 쉬게 해 주셨다.
The teacher us let rest
> **정답** The / teacher / let / us / rest

---

**19.** 나는 그가 노래하는 것을 들었다.
heard I him sing
> **정답** I / heard / him / sing

---

**20.** 그녀는 나에게 도와달라고 부탁했다.
asked She me to help her
> **정답** She / asked / me / to / help / her
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 108: 5형식 목적격 보어의 형태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 중 목적격보어로 현재분사를 사용하는 동사를 모두
고르시오.
smell make watch allow feel
want see hear
> **정답** smell, watch, feel, see hear

---

**02.** 다음 중 목적격보어로 동사원형을 사용하는 동사를 모두
고르시오.
want hear allow make have
help expect watch
> **정답** hear, make have help, watch

---

**03.** 다음 중 목적격보어로 to부정사를 사용하는 동사를 모두
고르시오.
have allow ask want let help
make feel
> **정답** allow ask want, help

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My mom wants me ____________________ good
English.
So, she had me ______________ English conversation
class.
to speak - take
speak - to take
to speak - to take
speak - take
> **정답** to speak - take

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
I saw my daughter _______________ very hard.
So, I let her _____________ some rest.
to study - get
study - get
study - to get
studying - to get
> **정답** study - get

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom could smell something _________________.
He quickly made his brother _________________ the
oven.
burning - turn off
to burn - turning off
burn - turning off
to burn - turn off
> **정답** burning - turn off

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
The boss let the worker taking a day off.
Amy wants her mother to stay healthy.
The teacher had the student to solve the
question.
I heard him call my name.
> **정답** The teacher had the student to solve the question., The boss let the worker taking a day off.

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The child felt his health get bad.
He helped him find the book.
Tom saw her playing the piano.
Amy ordered me bathe the dog.
> **정답** Amy ordered me bathe the dog.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
선생님은 그 소년이 의자를 옮기도록 했다.
The teacher made the boy moves the chair.
The teacher made the boy to move the chair.
The teacher made the boy moving the chair.
The teacher made the boy move the chair.
> **정답** The teacher made the boy move the chair.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그녀가 내 생일파티에 올 거라고 예상한다.
I expect her come to my birthday party.
I expect her to come to my birthday party.
I expect her coming to my birthday party.
I expected her to come to my birthday party.
> **정답** I expect her to come to my birthday party.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. (2개)
나는 그들이 무대 위에서 노래하는 것을 보았다.
I saw them to sing on the stage.
I saw them singing on the stage.
I saw their singing on the stage.
I saw them sing on the stage.
> **정답** I saw them sing on the stage., I saw them singing on the stage.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom let them playing outside the building.
She didn't allow anyone entering her room.
Amy was watching me mopping the floor.
The police help me catching the bad guy.
> **정답** Amy was watching me mopping the floor.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I asked Tom lending some money to me.
I allow my sister use my computer.
They let us having some fun in the pool.
Tom heard her sing a beautiful song.
> **정답** Tom heard her sing a beautiful song.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He wants me to jog every morning.
My sister has my brother helps her with
homework.
Tom let his friend sit next to him.
Amy watched me drawing her face.
> **정답** My sister has my brother helps her with homework.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I will have my friends come to my birthday
party.
Can you allow us to have some snack during
the movie?
The waiter heard the customer to call.
The test result made me cry.
> **정답** The waiter heard the customer to call.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The scene in the movie made
me feeling homesick.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** feeling → feel

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
My art teacher had me to
color my picture red and blue.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to color → color

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Thankfully, the teacher allowed
us take a break for five
minutes earlier.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** take → to take

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I saw her hands to shake.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to shake. → shake (shaking)

---

**20.** 다음 주어진 단어를 문맥에 알맞은 형태로 고치시오.
Tom was home alone. Suddenly he heard
someone enter his house. He was frightened.
Then he saw a shadow move fast. He called
the police. The police arrived soon. Tom let
them look around the house.
> **정답** enter (entering), move (moving), look
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 108 5형식 목적격 보어의 형태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
농구 코치는 Nick이 슛을 던지는 것을 보고 있다. [watch,
shoot]
The basketball coach is  (     )  Nick  (     )  the ball.
정답 watching, shoot (shooting)

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
그 친절한 여성은 내가 먼저 가도록 허락해주었다. [allow,
go first]
The kind lady  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 allowed, me, to, go, first

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Catherine은 그 남자가 자신에게 사과하게끔 했다.
[make, him, apologize]
Catherine  (     )   (     )   (     )  to her.
정답 made, him, apologize

---

**04.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[When]  [my]  [daughters]  [return]  [home,]
I  [have]  [them]  [to]  [wash]  [their]
[hands.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 to wash → wash

---

**05.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(현재분사 제외)
[Lisa]  [heard]  [him]  [to]  [whisper]
[her]  [name.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• whisper 속삭이다, 소곤거리다
정답 to whisper → whisper

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
have, play
A: Do you want your son to study well?
B: Yes, but I will  (     )   (     )   (     )  more for now.
정답 have, him, play

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (과거시제)
allow, wear
A: Wow, what a nice dress! Is that yours?
B: No, it's my sister's. She  (     )  me  (     )  
it today.
정답 allowed, to, wear

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 영작하시오. (필요하면 단어의 형태를
변형할 것)
나는 누군가 윗층에서 뛰는 소리를 들었다. [hear,
somebody, run, upstairs]
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 heard, somebody, running (run), upstairs

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 영작하시오. (필요하면 단어의 형태를
변형할 것)
그 남자는 그녀가 거실에서 기다리게 했다. [make, she,
wait]
The man  (     )   (     )   (     )  in the living room.
정답 made, her, wait

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 영작하시오. (필요하면 단어의 형태를
변형할 것)
엄마는 내가 교사가 되기를 원한다. [ I, be, a teacher]
My mom  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 wants, me, to, be, a, teacher

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 108: 5형식 목적격 보어의 형태 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 중 목적격보어로 현재분사를 사용하는 동사를 모두 고르시오.
smell  make  watch  allow  feel want  see  hear
> 정답: smell, watch, feel, see hear

---

**02.** 다음 중 목적격보어로 동사원형을 사용하는 동사를 모두 고르시오.
want  hear  allow  make  have help  expect  watch
> 정답: hear, make have help, watch

---

**03.** 다음 중 목적격보어로 to부정사를 사용하는 동사를 모두 고르시오.
have  allow  ask  want  let  help make  feel
> 정답: allow ask want, help

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My dad wants me ____________________ good Korean.
So, he had me ______________ Korean writing class.
to learn - take learn - to take to learn - to take learn - take
> 정답: to learn - take

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
I saw my son _______________ very hard.
So, I let him _____________ some rest. to study - get study - get study - to get studying - to get
> 정답: study - get

---

**06.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Amy could smell something _________________.
She quickly made her sister _________________ the stove.
burning - turn off to burn - turning off burn - turning off to burn - turn off
> 정답: burning - turn off

---

**07.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) The teacher let the student taking a day off.
Tom wants his father to stay healthy.
The coach had the player to run the lap.
I heard her call my name.
> 정답: The coach had the player to run the lap., The boss let the worker taking a day off.

---

**08.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The boy felt his body get weak.
He helped her find the key.
Amy saw him playing the drum.
Tom ordered me bathe the cat.
> 정답: Tom ordered me bathe the cat.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
코치는 그 선수가 공을 던지도록 했다.
The coach made the player throws the ball.
The coach made the player to throw the ball.
The coach made the player throwing the ball.
The coach made the player throw the ball.
> 정답: The coach made the player throw the ball.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
나는 그가 내 졸업식에 올 거라고 예상한다.
I expect him come to my graduation.
I expect him to come to my graduation.
I expect him coming to my graduation.
I expected him to come to my graduation.
> 정답: I expect him to come to my graduation.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
(2개) 나는 그들이 운동장에서 달리는 것을 보았다.
I saw them to run on the field.
I saw them running on the field.
I saw their running on the field.
I saw them run on the field.
> 정답: I saw them run on the field., I saw them running on the field.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom let them playing outside the building.
She didn't allow anyone entering her room.
Amy was watching me sweeping the floor.
The officer helped me catching the suspect.
> 정답: Amy was watching me sweeping the floor.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I asked Amy lending some books to me.
I allow my brother use my tablet.
They let us having some fun in the park.
Tom heard her sing a lovely song.
> 정답: Tom heard her sing a lovely song.

---

**14.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
She wants me to jog every morning.
My brother has my sister helps him with homework.
Tom let his friend sit next to him.
Amy watched me drawing her portrait.
> 정답: My brother has my sister helps him with homework.

---

**15.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I will have my friends come to my party.
Can you allow us to have some snacks during the break?
The waiter heard the guest to call.
The news made me cry.
> 정답: The waiter heard the guest to call.

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  scene  in  the  drama  made me  feeling  homesick. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: feeling → feel

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서

**20.** 다음 주어진 단어를 문맥에 알맞은 형태로 고치시오. Amy was home alone. Suddenly she heard someone enter her house.
She was frightened. Then she saw a shadow move fast. She called the police.
The police arrived soon. Amy let them look around the house.
> 정답: enter (entering), move (moving), look
